commonErrors.message: Project type did not match expectation

summary: Development of a multi-sided food delivery platform connecting customers, restaurants, and couriers.
The scope covers the end-to-end lifecycle of food ordering, from restaurant onboarding to final delivery and administrative oversight.
explicit_requirements: Rating and review system for users
Centralized admin dashboard for platform management
assumptions: The solution requires three distinct user interfaces: Customer app, Delivery Driver app, and Restaurant Manager portal.
Real-time tracking will utilize third-party GPS services like Google Maps or Mapbox.
Payments will be handled via a third-party gateway (e.g., Stripe, Braintree, or PayPal).
The admin dashboard will manage disputes, platform fees, and content moderation.
missing_information: What are the target platforms (iOS, Android, and/or Web)?
What is the delivery model (internal restaurant drivers or a freelance courier fleet)?
Which geographical regions and currencies need to be supported?
Are there specific requirements for menu management (e.g., inventory tracking, dynamic pricing)?
What are the notification requirements (Push, SMS, Email)?
Are there specific regulatory or data privacy requirements (e.g., GDPR, CCPA)?

modules.description: Handles authentication, authorization, and profile management for customers, restaurant managers, couriers, and administrators.
features: Profile management for all user types

modules.description: Allows restaurants to manage their digital presence, menus, and operating parameters.
The central engine orchestrating the lifecycle of an order from creation to completion.
features: Order status state machine (Pending, Confirmed, Preparing, Ready, Completed)

modules.description: Integrates with third-party gateways to process customer payments and manage platform fee distributions.
Manages the courier fleet, real-time location tracking, and delivery assignment logic.
features: Real-time GPS tracking via Mapbox/Google Maps

modules.description: A feedback loop for customers to evaluate restaurants and delivery performance.
Handles transactional and marketing communications via multiple channels.
features: Push notifications for order status updates

modules.description: An overarching management interface for platform administrators to monitor health and resolve issues.

results.error: Project type did not match expectation

summary: Development of a comprehensive e-commerce web platform supporting customer-facing shopping experiences.
Provision for seller-side management and data-driven insights through analytics.
Implementation of core transactional workflows from search to order fulfillment.
assumptions: The platform is intended to be a multi-vendor marketplace given the 'seller management' requirement.
A secure payment gateway integration will be necessary for the checkout process.
The platform requires a tiered user permission system (Customers, Sellers, and System Administrators).
The 'analytics' requirement includes both sales reports for sellers and platform-wide metrics for owners.
missing_information: Specific technology stack preferences (e.g., MEAN, MERN, Shopify, Magento).
Target geographic regions for tax calculation and currency support.
Integration requirements for third-party logistics (3PL) or shipping carriers.
Required security certifications or compliance standards (e.g., PCI-DSS, GDPR).
Scale expectations (expected SKU count and concurrent user traffic).
Mobile application requirements (iOS/Android) in addition to the web platform.

modules.description: Centralized service for managing user identities, authentication protocols, and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) across Customers, Sellers, and Administrators.
Manages multi-vendor product listings and provides high-performance search and filtering capabilities.
Handles the secure transition from shopping cart to completed transaction, including payment processing and tax calculation.
Coordinates the lifecycle of an order from creation to delivery, providing visibility to both customers and sellers.
A dedicated interface for vendors to manage their store presence, inventory, and fulfillment operations.
Aggregates transactional and behavioral data to provide insights for both sellers and platform administrators.
features: Platform-wide GMV and user growth metrics

roles.title: Lead Full-stack Engineer
roles.focus: System architecture, authentication workflows, and CI/CD pipeline management.

roles.title: Frontend Engineer
roles.focus: Developing interactive dashboards, data visualization components, and responsive UI.

roles.title: Backend/Data Engineer
roles.focus: API development, database schema design, and optimizing analytical queries.

roles.title: Product Designer (UI/UX)
roles.focus: User flow optimization, wireframing, and design system creation.

stack.reporting_engine: Puppeteer (for PDF exports) or Resend (for email reports)
